enrichment.short_description: AI-powered social media management platform for scheduling, content creation, and automated engagement across multiple channels.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Ocoya is an AI social media tool for scheduling posts, generating content, and automating engagement across platforms.

features.title: AI content & caption generation
features.description: Generates social captions, images, and translations using built-in AI tools.

features.title: AI agents & automation
features.description: Pre-built AI agent templates automate posting, DM replies, and comment-to-DM conversion.

features.title: Content calendar
features.description: Visual calendar with best-time-to-post recommendations for scheduling content in advance.

features.title: Multi-level approvals
features.description: Internal, client, and stakeholder approval workflows before publishing.

features.title: Media library integrations
features.description: Built-in access to Unsplash, Giphy, and Canva templates for content creation.

features.title: Brand & link management
features.description: Theme colors, hashtag presets, and UTM-tagged link shortening for brand consistency.

pros: Combines scheduling, AI content generation, and automation workflows in one platform.
Tiered plans scale from solo users to agencies with up to 150 social profiles.
Built-in integrations with Canva, Unsplash, and e-commerce platforms like Shopify and WooCommerce.
cons: No permanent free plan — only a 7-day free trial before billing begins.
Entry-level Bronze plan is capped at 1 workspace, 1 user, and 5 social profiles.
AI features are metered by monthly credits rather than unlimited usage.

faqs.question: Does Ocoya offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, all paid plans include a 7-day free trial with full feature access.

faqs.question: What social platforms does Ocoya support?
faqs.answer: Ocoya supports scheduling to Facebook, Instagram, X, and Pinterest, among 30+ integrations.

faqs.question: Does Ocoya include AI content generation?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ocoya includes AI tools for caption writing, image generation, translation, and rephrasing.

faqs.question: Can teams collaborate on approvals in Ocoya?
faqs.answer: Yes, Ocoya supports multi-level internal, client, and stakeholder approval workflows.

use_cases.title: Agency client management
use_cases.description: Manage multiple client workspaces with approval workflows and role-based access.

use_cases.title: Solo brand scheduling
use_cases.description: Plan and auto-post content with AI-generated captions on the entry-level plan.

use_cases.title: E-commerce promotion automation
use_cases.description: Automate product release posts and RSS-triggered content for online stores.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Ocoya?
paragraphs: Ocoya is an AI-powered social media management platform that combines content scheduling, AI caption and image generation, and workflow automation for teams managing multiple social accounts.

The platform includes pre-built AI agent templates for tasks like automated posting, comment-to-DM conversion, and chatbot-style DM replies, alongside a visual content calendar and brand asset management tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Ocoya is for
paragraphs: Ocoya is built for freelancers, small marketing teams, and agencies that need to manage several client accounts with approval workflows, as well as e-commerce brands looking to automate product-related social content.

enrichment.short_description: Visual social media scheduler with AI captions and cross-platform publishing for Instagram, TikTok, and more, owned by Linktree.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Plann is a social media scheduler with a drag-and-drop planner, AI captions, and cross-platform auto-posting, owned by Linktree.

features.title: Visual drag-and-drop planner
features.description: Plan and rearrange a content grid weeks in advance across multiple networks.

features.title: AI caption & idea generator
features.description: Generates on-brand captions and content ideas tailored to social media.

features.title: Cross-platform scheduling
features.description: Auto-posts to Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, and Threads.

features.title: Team collaboration
features.description: Team chat, notifications, and approval workflows for managing multiple accounts.

features.title: Mobile companion app
features.description: Native iOS and Android apps for scheduling and approvals on the go.

features.title: Template library
features.description: Ready-to-use design templates alongside Pixabay and Pexels stock media integration.

pros: Free Forever plan available with no credit card required.
Supports auto-posting across seven major social platforms.
Includes native mobile apps for iOS and Android, not just a web dashboard.
Backed by Linktree, giving it broader product integration and stability.
cons: Free plan is limited to one brand, one user, and Instagram-only scheduling.
AI features are capped at 30 monthly credits on the free tier.
Multi-brand and team collaboration features require the higher-priced Grow plan.

faqs.question: Does Plann have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free Forever plan supports 1 brand, 1 user, and Instagram-only scheduling with 30 monthly AI credits.

faqs.question: What platforms can I schedule to with Plann?
faqs.answer: Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest, LinkedIn, and YouTube Shorts, plus Threads.

faqs.question: Does Plann have a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, Plann offers companion apps for iOS and Android.

faqs.question: Who owns Plann?
faqs.answer: Plann is owned by Linktree.

use_cases.title: Solo creator scheduling
use_cases.description: Plan and auto-post content across platforms on the Power User plan with unlimited posts.

use_cases.title: Team content approvals
use_cases.description: Coordinate multi-account publishing with team chat and approval flows on the Build plan.

use_cases.title: Free-tier Instagram scheduling
use_cases.description: Try automated Instagram posting and limited AI captions before upgrading.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Plann?
paragraphs: Plann is a social media management platform, owned by Linktree, that combines a visual drag-and-drop content calendar with AI caption generation and cross-platform auto-posting to Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, and Threads.
The platform includes native iOS and Android apps, team collaboration tools like chat and approval workflows, and a free-forever tier for single-brand Instagram scheduling.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Plann is for
paragraphs: Plann suits solo creators who want a free entry point for Instagram scheduling, as well as small teams and agencies managing multiple brands that need collaboration and approval workflows.

enrichment.short_description: Unified social media workspace for scheduling, approvals, and analytics across 10 platforms, founded in 2014 in Melbourne.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Sked Social is a social media management platform for scheduling, approvals, and reporting, built in Melbourne since 2014.

features.title: Cross-channel publishing
features.description: Native scheduling to Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Threads, Facebook, Snapchat, Google Business Profile, LinkedIn, and X.

features.title: Smart Assist AI
features.description: AI-assisted caption drafting, reply suggestions, and content summaries with editable output.

features.title: Approval workflows
features.description: Internal and external review with no-login client approval portals.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Manage DMs, comments, and mentions across channels in one inbox.

features.title: Built-in video editor
features.description: Timeline-based video editing with captions before publishing.

features.title: Analytics & reporting
features.description: Custom reports with PDF/Excel export and social listening.

pros: Flat team-based pricing rather than uncapped per-seat charges.
SOC 2 Type 2 certified, relevant for enterprise and healthcare compliance needs.
Native publishing to 10 platforms, including Google Business Profile and Snapchat.
Integrates with Notion, Asana, Trello, HubSpot, Salesforce, and Zapier.
cons: Internal and external approval workflows are add-ons on the Grow plan rather than included by default.
Additional users and profiles beyond plan limits carry extra annual fees.
No permanent free plan — only a 14-day free trial.

faqs.question: Does Sked Social have a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How many platforms does Sked Social support?
faqs.answer: It natively publishes to 10 platforms, including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, and LinkedIn.

faqs.question: Where is Sked Social based?
faqs.answer: Sked Social was founded in 2014 in Melbourne, Australia, and is Australian owned.

faqs.question: Does Sked Social include AI tools?
faqs.answer: Yes, its Smart Assist feature drafts captions, replies, and summaries.

use_cases.title: Multi-location franchise publishing
use_cases.description: Coordinate consistent posting across many locations with role-based permissions.

use_cases.title: Agency client approvals
use_cases.description: Use no-login client portals for external content approval before publishing.

use_cases.title: Compliance-driven social teams
use_cases.description: Run approval-first workflows for regulated industries like healthcare.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Sked Social?
paragraphs: Sked Social is a social media management platform, founded in 2014 in Melbourne, Australia, that unifies content planning, cross-channel publishing, approvals, and reporting in a single workspace.
The platform natively publishes to 10 channels including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Google Business Profile, and includes an AI-assisted Smart Assist feature for drafting captions and replies.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Sked Social is for
paragraphs: Sked Social is aimed at growing brands, agencies, multi-location franchises, and enterprise or healthcare teams that need approval-based workflows and flat team pricing rather than per-seat charges.

enrichment.short_description: AI-powered social listening tool that tracks brand mentions and sentiment across 25M+ online sources in real time.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Brand24 monitors brand mentions with AI sentiment analysis across social media, news, blogs, and forums in real time.

features.title: Real-time mention monitoring
features.description: Tracks mentions across social media, news, blogs, forums, podcasts, reviews, and video.

features.title: AI sentiment analysis
features.description: Classifies mentions as positive, negative, or neutral, including sarcasm and context detection.

features.title: AI Brand Assistant & AI Insights
features.description: Higher-tier plans include AI-generated insights and topic analysis from collected mentions.

features.title: Hashtag & campaign tracking
features.description: Measures reach and engagement of hashtags and campaigns.

features.title: Competitive analysis
features.description: Benchmarks brand mentions and sentiment against competitors.

features.title: 108-language detection
features.description: Detects and analyzes mentions across 108 languages.

pros: Monitors over 25 million sources including news, forums, and review sites.
Sentiment analysis includes sarcasm and contextual detection, not just keyword matching.
Scales from a single-keyword Individual plan to a custom Enterprise tier.
cons: No permanent free plan — only a 14-day free trial.
Entry-level Individual plan is capped at 3 keywords and 2,000 mentions/month.
Real-time update frequency is reserved for the Pro plan and above.

faqs.question: Does Brand24 have a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How many languages does Brand24 support for sentiment analysis?
faqs.answer: It detects mentions and sentiment across 108 languages.

faqs.question: Where is Brand24 headquartered?
faqs.answer: Brand24 is headquartered in Daytona Beach, Florida, USA.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest Brand24 plan?
faqs.answer: The Individual plan starts at $199/month billed annually, covering 3 keywords and 2,000 mentions per month.

use_cases.title: Brand reputation monitoring
use_cases.description: Track mentions and sentiment in real time to respond to reputation issues quickly.

use_cases.title: Competitive benchmarking
use_cases.description: Compare mention volume and sentiment against competitors using the Pro plan and above.

use_cases.title: Campaign hashtag tracking
use_cases.description: Measure reach and engagement of branded hashtag campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Brand24?
paragraphs: Brand24 is an AI-powered social listening and media monitoring platform that tracks brand, product, and competitor mentions across more than 25 million online sources, including social media, news, blogs, forums, and review sites.
It applies AI sentiment analysis — including sarcasm and contextual detection across 108 languages — plus hashtag tracking, competitive benchmarking, and automated reporting.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Brand24 is for
paragraphs: Brand24 is used by PR professionals, marketing agencies, and brands that need to monitor reputation and campaign performance across a large number of online sources in real time.

enrichment.short_description: Web and social monitoring tool that tracks brand mentions across 13B+ pages daily with sentiment analysis and Boolean search.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Awario tracks brand and competitor mentions across social media and the web daily, with sentiment analysis and alerts.

features.title: Real-time web crawling
features.description: Crawls over 13 billion web pages daily to surface new brand and competitor mentions.

features.title: Sentiment analysis
features.description: Evaluates mentions as positive, negative, or neutral.

features.title: Boolean/advanced search
features.description: Builds precise monitoring topics using Boolean search operators.

features.title: Influencer identification
features.description: Surfaces influencers discussing relevant topics for outreach.

features.title: Custom reports & white-label PDF export
features.description: Generates white-label PDF reports for clients or stakeholders.

features.title: Slack integration & API access
features.description: Sends alerts to Slack and supports API access for custom integrations on all plans.

pros: All plans include Boolean search, API access, and white-label reporting, not gated to top tiers.
Monitors a wide range of source types including Reddit, forums, and general web pages beyond social networks.
Pricing is in euros with a clear annual discount versus monthly billing.
cons: No permanent free plan — pricing starts with a paid Starter tier after trial.
Starter plan is limited to 3 monitored topics and 5,000 stored mentions per topic.
Team collaboration is capped at 1 member on the entry-level Starter plan.

faqs.question: Does Awario have a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, Awario offers a free trial signup.

faqs.question: How many web pages does Awario crawl?
faqs.answer: It crawls over 13 billion web pages daily for new mentions.

faqs.question: Does Awario include API access?
faqs.answer: Yes, API access is included on all plans, including Starter.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest Awario plan?
faqs.answer: The Starter plan starts at €29/month billed annually, covering 3 topics and 30,000 new mentions/month.

use_cases.title: Competitor mention tracking
use_cases.description: Monitor competitor brand mentions across the web and social platforms.

use_cases.title: Influencer outreach
use_cases.description: Identify influencers discussing relevant topics for partnership outreach.

use_cases.title: Agency client reporting
use_cases.description: Generate white-label PDF reports for client brand monitoring.

features: Boolean search, API access, white-label reports

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Awario?
paragraphs: Awario is a social media and web monitoring platform that crawls over 13 billion web pages daily to track brand, product, and competitor mentions across social networks, forums, blogs, news, and general web content.
It includes sentiment analysis, Boolean/advanced search for precise topic monitoring, influencer identification, and API access included on every plan.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Awario is for
paragraphs: Awario suits marketing professionals, PR specialists, and agencies that need broad web and social mention tracking with API access and white-label reporting for clients.

name: Keyhole
skip_reason: Official site (keyhole.co) consistently returned HTTP 403 Forbidden across multiple fetch attempts (root, www, /pricing, /features) — unable to verify any facts from the official source, so no content was fabricated.

enrichment.short_description: Competitive social media analytics platform for benchmarking performance against competitors on six major networks.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Rival IQ benchmarks social media performance against competitors across Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, and more.

features.title: Competitive benchmarking
features.description: Compares social performance metrics against tracked competitor accounts.

features.title: Social media audits
features.description: Generates custom audit reports across tracked profiles.

features.title: Social listening
features.description: Includes sentiment analysis and saved searches on Engage plans and above.

features.title: Influencer & hashtag tracking
features.description: Tracks influencer activity and hashtag performance.

features.title: Facebook Ads analytics
features.description: Reports on Facebook ad performance, available from the Engage plan up.

features.title: Google Data Studio Connector
features.description: Connects Rival IQ data directly into Google Data Studio dashboards.

pros: 14-day free trial with no credit card required, plus a money-back guarantee on monthly plans.
Covers six major networks: TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and YouTube.
Offers a Social Insights API for custom integrations on higher tiers.
cons: No permanent free plan — pricing starts at $239/month for the Drive tier.
Social listening features are excluded from the entry-level Drive plan.
Extra user accounts and tracked companies incur additional monthly fees.

faqs.question: Does Rival IQ offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What social networks does Rival IQ track?
faqs.answer: TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

faqs.question: Who owns Rival IQ?
faqs.answer: Rival IQ operates as part of Quid, which acquired the company.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest Rival IQ plan?
faqs.answer: The Drive plan starts at $239/month for 10 tracked companies and 1 user.

use_cases.title: Competitive social benchmarking
use_cases.description: Compare your brand's social performance against up to 40 tracked competitors.

use_cases.title: Agency client audits
use_cases.description: Produce custom social media audit reports for client accounts.

use_cases.title: Higher-ed social reporting
use_cases.description: Track and benchmark institutional social accounts against peer schools.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Rival IQ?
paragraphs: Rival IQ is a competitive social media analytics platform that lets marketers benchmark their performance against competitors across TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, and YouTube.
The platform, part of Quid, offers social audits, social listening with sentiment analysis, influencer and hashtag tracking, and a Social Insights API for custom reporting on higher-tier plans.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Rival IQ is for
paragraphs: Rival IQ is built for digital marketers, agencies, and higher-education or nonprofit teams that need to benchmark social performance against a defined set of competitors.

name: Tubebuddy
skip_reason: Official site (tubebuddy.com and www.tubebuddy.com) consistently returned HTTP 403 Forbidden across multiple fetch attempts (root, /pricing, /blog) — unable to verify any facts from the official source, so no content was fabricated.

enrichment.short_description: YouTube and Instagram growth platform offering AI-powered video optimization, analytics, and creator coaching.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: vidIQ offers AI-powered YouTube optimization, analytics, and coaching tools, with a free plan and a paid Max tier.

features.title: AI video optimization
features.description: AI-generated suggestions for titles, tags, and thumbnails.

features.title: AI Coach
features.description: Personalized growth guidance, with deeper conversation capability on paid plans.

features.title: Browser extension
features.description: YouTube browser extension surfacing optimization data directly on the platform.

features.title: Mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android apps for tracking channel performance.

features.title: Trends & content ideas
features.description: Niche trend research and data-backed content idea suggestions.

features.title: Short clipping tools
features.description: Generates short-form video clips, with expanded hours on the Max plan.

pros: Offers a genuine free plan with 150 monthly AI credits, not just a trial.
Includes both a browser extension and native iOS/Android apps.
Max plan adds a more powerful AI mode and short-clipping tools for higher-volume creators.
cons: AI features are metered by monthly credit limits across all plans, including paid tiers.
Higher-tier AI Coach and Max Mode capabilities are reserved for the Max plan.
Enterprise pricing is custom and not published.

faqs.question: Does vidIQ have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Free plan includes 150 monthly AI credits and core research tools at no cost.

faqs.question: What does the vidIQ Max plan cost?
faqs.answer: Max is $39/month billed annually and includes 6,000 monthly AI credits.

faqs.question: Does vidIQ work on Instagram?
faqs.answer: Yes, vidIQ includes Instagram optimization tools in addition to YouTube.

faqs.question: Is there a vidIQ mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, vidIQ has apps for both iOS and Android.

use_cases.title: New creator channel growth
use_cases.description: Use free trend research and AI content ideas to grow a channel from scratch.

use_cases.title: High-volume content optimization
use_cases.description: Use Max Mode AI and expanded short-clipping hours for frequent video production.

use_cases.title: Multi-channel brand management
use_cases.description: Manage optimization and reporting across multiple channels with team roles.

features: Up to 11 hours of short clipping and generation

long_form_blocks.heading: What is vidIQ?
paragraphs: vidIQ is a YouTube and Instagram growth platform that provides AI-powered video optimization — including titles, tags, and thumbnails — plus analytics and creator coaching to help video creators grow views and subscribers.
The platform is available as a browser extension and mobile app for iOS and Android, with a free tier and paid Max and Enterprise plans offering higher AI credit limits and more advanced coaching.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who vidIQ is for
paragraphs: vidIQ serves creators ranging from beginners using the free plan for trend research to established creators and brands that need higher AI usage limits, short-clipping tools, and cross-channel reporting.

enrichment.short_description: YouTube analytics tool that benchmarks channels against similar-sized peers and guides video search optimization.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Morningfame provides YouTube analytics, peer channel benchmarking, and search optimization guidance for creators.

features.title: Video search optimization
features.description: Guides creators through optimizing videos for YouTube Search rankings.

features.title: Channel benchmarking
features.description: Compares a channel's performance against similarly sized channels to spot gaps.

features.title: Actionable recommendations
features.description: Provides specific improvement suggestions based on comparative data.

features.title: Video performance analysis
features.description: Identifies which videos over- or under-performed to help replicate successful patterns.

pros: Focuses specifically on peer benchmarking rather than only self-comparison analytics.
Offers a demo report so prospective users can see sample output before signing up.
cons: Pricing was not visible on the official pages we could access.
No AI capabilities are described on the official site.
Only supports YouTube, with no stated support for other platforms.

faqs.question: What does Morningfame do?
faqs.answer: It provides YouTube analytics and search optimization guidance, including benchmarking against similarly sized channels.

faqs.question: Does Morningfame offer a demo?
faqs.answer: Yes, a demo report is available via a link on the site.

faqs.question: Does Morningfame support platforms other than YouTube?
faqs.answer: The official site only describes YouTube-focused features.

use_cases.title: Video SEO improvement
use_cases.description: Optimize video titles, descriptions, and tags to rank in YouTube Search.

use_cases.title: Peer channel benchmarking
use_cases.description: Compare channel performance against similarly sized YouTube channels to find growth gaps.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Morningfame?
paragraphs: Morningfame is a YouTube analytics platform that helps creators optimize videos for YouTube Search and benchmarks their channel against similarly sized peers to identify performance gaps.
It highlights which videos outperformed or underperformed relative to a creator's other content, helping creators replicate what worked.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Morningfame is for
paragraphs: Morningfame is aimed at YouTube creators of all sizes who want data-driven guidance on video search optimization and want to see how their channel compares to similar peers.
